note: Old chapter 9 merged into chapter 8; section-level old->new mapping must be read from the 1980 (8th GA) amendment text.
Old 24-6 became 24-7 (a 1988-or-earlier citation of 24-6 maps forward to 24-7).
New 15-1..15-5 inserted; the page states old 15-4 -> 15-6. Full per-section crosswalk for ch.15 needs the 1989 (17th GA) amendment text.

A new 24-5 was inserted at the 32nd/33rd GA (2004-05), shifting old 24-5..24-9 down by one. The pre-2005 24-5 (ruling-elder/deacon ordination service + vows, incl. the 'system of doctrine' vow 24-5-2) became 24-6. Verified against the corpus: Bowen v. E. Carolina (M19GA 1991) cites 24-5-2; minutes from ~2009+ cite the same vow as 24-6.
New 5-5 inserted; sections 5-5+ shift +1. Exact range needs the 2011 (39th GA) amendment text.
Change at 8-8 with renumbering thereafter; read the 2023 (50th GA) amendment text for old->new.
35-1 through 35-5 renumbered; read the 2023 (50th GA) amendment text for old->new.
